arguments.name: There are no inputs for this command.

description: Create a new credentials release request: beyondtrust-create-release-request
examples:
Command Example
!beyondtrust-get-managed-accounts
Human Readable Output
BeyondTrust Managed Accounts
AccountName
AccountID
AssetName
AssetID

!beyondtrust-get-managed-accounts
Human Readable Output
BeyondTrust Managed Accounts
AccountName
AccountID
AssetName
AssetID
LastChangeDate
name: beyondtrust-get-managed-accounts

outputs.description: ID of the managed system platform. BeyondTrust.Account.SystemID ID of the managed system.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.Account.PlatformID

outputs.description: Name of the managed system. BeyondTrust.Account.DomainName ID of the managed account.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.Account.SystemName

outputs.description: Name of the managed account. BeyondTrust.Account.InstanceName Database instance name of a database-type managed system.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.Account.AccountName

outputs.description: Default release duration. BeyondTrust.Account.MaximumReleaseDuration Maximum release duration.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.Account.DefualtReleaseDuration

outputs.description: Date The date and time of the last password change. BeyondTrust.Account.NexeChangeDate
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.Account.LastChangeDate

outputs.description: The date and time of the next scheduled password change. BeyondTrust.Account.IsChanging True if the account credentials are in the process of changing, otherwise false.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: True if the account is for Information Systems Administrator (ISA) access, otherwise false. BeyondTrust.Account.AccountID ID of the managed account.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.Account.IsISAAccess
